config.name: blogger
config.label: Blogger
config.description: Connect your domain to your Blogger blog.

fields.name: blog_subdomain
fields.label: Blog Subdomain
fields.description: The subdomain you want to use for your blog, such as www or blog.

fields.name: security_name
fields.label: Security CNAME Name
fields.description: The short host value Blogger shows when you set up a custom domain.

fields.name: security_target
fields.label: Security CNAME Target
fields.description: The destination Blogger shows for the security CNAME.
